AttestResponse.description: A recorded attestation. ``attestation.valid`` carries the state.
AttestResponse.title: AttestResponse

Attestation.description: One append-only attestation-manifest record (an attest or an invalidation).
Attestation.title: Attestation

CsrfToken.description: The CSRF token returned alongside the double-submit cookie.
CsrfToken.title: CsrfToken

DecisionKind.description: The four propose-then-approve attorney gates (plan P-28).
DecisionKind.title: DecisionKind

DecisionOption.description: One selectable course of action, with the consequence of choosing it.
DecisionOption.title: DecisionOption

DecisionProposal.description: A persona's proposed call: what it is, why, and the options to choose among.
DecisionProposal.title: DecisionProposal

DecisionResolution.description: The recorded outcome of a decision — how it was resolved and by whom.
DecisionResolution.title: DecisionResolution

DecisionsResponse.description:
The run's attorney-gate decisions; each ``decision.status`` is the discriminated
`DecisionStatus` Literal.
DecisionsResponse.title: DecisionsResponse

DeliverableInfo.description: One deliverable file with its DRAFT/clean state and download eligibility.
DeliverableInfo.title: DeliverableInfo

DeliverablesResponse.description: The run's deliverables plus the export-ready predicate (the colophon gate).
DeliverablesResponse.title: DeliverablesResponse

FreeformTaskRequest.description: The body of the freeform on-ramp: an attorney's free-text task intent.
FreeformTaskRequest.title: FreeformTaskRequest

GateFail.description: The artifact is blocked by this gate — a terminal state for the artifact.
GateFail.title: GateFail

GateFinding.description: One specific reason a gate reached its verdict (``code`` + human message).
GateFinding.title: GateFinding

GateLedgerResponse.description:
The run's gate ledger plus the per-turn `GateResult` discriminated union
(`GatePass | GateFail | GatePending`, discriminated on ``status``).
GateLedgerResponse.title: GateLedgerResponse

GatePending.description: The gate could not be evaluated yet (e.g. an external check is queued).
GatePending.title: GatePending

MatterSummary.description:
Listing-safe summary of a single matter vault.

`display_name`/`case_number` are the caption strings a human uses to recognize a
matter (court captions are public record, not `MatterText`). `rel_path` is the
vault directory name relative to the matters-root — never an absolute path.
MatterSummary.title: MatterSummary

PauseRequest.description: The optional body of a run-pause call; ``reason`` defaults to ``manual``.
PauseRequest.title: PauseRequest

RaiseCapRequest.description:
The body of a raise-cap call — exactly one of an absolute ``to_usd`` cap or a
``delta_usd`` increment over the run's current effective cap (plan D5).
RaiseCapRequest.title: RaiseCapRequest

RequestItem.description:
One served request (or a subpart of one) as a unit of work.

``subpart`` is ``None`` for a top-level request and a single lowercase letter
for a compound subpart, whose ``text`` is the subpart clause; the parent item
retains the full request text.
RequestItem.title: RequestItem

RequestsResponse.description: The served RFA/discovery request units in scope for the run (matter-scoped).
RequestsResponse.title: RequestsResponse

ResolveRequest.description:
The body of a decision-resolve call. ``decided_by`` and the timestamp are
server-derived (from the verified principal), never client-supplied.
ResolveRequest.title: ResolveRequest

ResolveResponse.description: A resolved decision. ``decision.status`` is the `Literal` discriminated state.
ResolveResponse.title: ResolveResponse

RunActionResponse.description:
The result of a pause/resume/continue/raise-cap call, exposing the run's
resulting `RunStatus` (the discriminated domain state).
RunActionResponse.title: RunActionResponse

RunStatusSummary.description:
Single-run status envelope for the cockpit (folded from the journal). Exposes
the `RunStatus` Literal; also returned by the start-run wrapper.
RunStatusSummary.title: RunStatusSummary

RunSummary.description: Listing-safe summary of one run under a matter vault (derived from the fold).
RunSummary.title: RunSummary

SignedLinkResponse.description: A minted short-expiry download link bound to one (matter, run, deliverable).
SignedLinkResponse.title: SignedLinkResponse

StartRunRequest.description:
The body of a run-start call; ``task`` and ``mode`` mirror ``mootloop run start``.

``task_spec_id`` optionally binds the run to a resolved on-ramp TaskSpec (plan
FE-2.5); it is recorded on the ``RunStarted`` journal event.
StartRunRequest.title: StartRunRequest

TaskSpec.description:
A resolved (or unresolved) begin-task specification, persisted append-only.

``task`` is a registered task-adapter key (``discovery-responses``) when the intent
resolved, or ``None`` when it did not — an unresolved spec is recorded for the audit
trail but is NOT runnable (``runnable`` is ``False``): no run can start from it until
a later lane resolves the concept.
TaskSpec.title: TaskSpec

TaskSpecResponse.description:
A single TaskSpec produced (or looked up) by an on-ramp. ``runnable`` mirrors the
domain property: false when the intent did not resolve to a runnable task.
TaskSpecResponse.title: TaskSpecResponse

TaskSpecsResponse.description: Every recorded TaskSpec for a matter (append order).
TaskSpecsResponse.title: TaskSpecsResponse

info.description: Hosted write-tier API over per-matter vaults (Access-gated).
info.title: MootLoop matter API

get.description:
Validate a signed link, AUDIT-APPEND FIRST (fail closed), then stream the file.

Not matter-scoped in the path — the token carries the (matter, run, deliverable)
audience. The access audit MUST record before a byte streams: if the audit write
fails, `AuditWriteError` propagates (500) and nothing is served (plan FD-3).

schema.title: Response List Matters Api Matters Get
Response List Runs Api Matters  Matter Id  Runs Get

post.description:
Clear a gated-mode checkpoint so the run resumes (mirrors ``mootloop run
continue``; the ``/resume`` route covers operator-paused runs).

get.description:
List a run's deliverables with DRAFT/clean state and per-file downloadability
(clean files are downloadable only once the run is export-ready; plan P-37).

post.description:
Mint a short-expiry signed link for one deliverable. A clean (non-DRAFT) file
that is not export-ready yields a typed 403 (``export_not_ready``); DRAFT files are
always linkable (plan FD-7 / P-37).

Raise a capped run's hard budget cap (absolute ``to_usd`` or ``delta_usd`` over
the current effective cap), reopening it for resumption (plan D5).

get.description:
Tail the run's journal as Server-Sent Events until it is terminal (plan FE-1).

A GET, so `RateLimitMiddleware` (write-only) never throttles it.
List the matter's recorded TaskSpecs (all lanes, append order).

post.description:
Resolve free-text intent to a TaskSpec (deterministic v1; unmapped -> ``task=None``,
recorded but not runnable). Persists append-only at ``tasks/specs.jsonl`` (plan FE-2.5).

get.description:
Liveness probe for the driver/BFF internal path — demonstrates the internal
auth guard is wired and introspectable; carries no matter data.

schema.title: Response Internal Ping Internal Ping Get

get.description: Claim the next work item for ``worker_id`` (or 204 when the queue is idle).
